# aesv.io

Personal website of Axel Stevens.

## About

Systems Integrator at Cornell University. Mexican American sentient flesh
pile. Casual pianist, bassist, and emergency drummer.

## Sections

- /: Dashboard. Tiles linking to every page; weather, music, and activity
       widgets pull live from APIs.
- /work: Case studies and services. Hire-me page.
- /feed: Notebook. Essays, fragments, fiction. RSS at /feed.xml.
- /music: Spotify deep-dive. Recent plays, top albums, what music is to me.
- /activities: Chess (Chess.com last victory) and Strava (last activity).
- /about: Bio.

## Endpoints

- /api/gpg: GPG public key.
- /api/auth/spotify: Spotify OAuth (admin-only).
- /api/auth/strava: Strava OAuth (admin-only).
- /health: Health check.

## Technical

Server-rendered HTML. Curl/wget receive a plain-text variant of every page.
Built with Node.js, Fastify, and Nunjucks.
